ddls:
CREATE TABLE "root_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root pair */,
  "root_1" INTEGER /* First root in the pair */,
  "root_2" INTEGER /* Second root in the pair */,
  "value_root_1" TEXT /* Value of the first root */,
  "value_root_2" TEXT /* Value of the second root */,
  "distance_between_roots" TEXT /* Distance between the two roots */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the root pair belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the root pair was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the root pair was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the root pair data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the root pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_root_pairs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes or megabytes */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or permissions associated with the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization associated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team within the institution */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or position of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user for the dataset */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_pair_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root pair version */,
  "root_pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the root pair */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the root pair */,
  "value_root_1" TEXT /* Value of the first root in the version */,
  "value_root_2" TEXT /* Value of the second root in the version */,
  "distance_between_roots" TEXT /* Distance between the two roots in the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the root pair version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* User who created the root pair version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_root_pair_versions_root_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("root_pair_id") REFERENCES root_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the dataset */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the analysis result */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
